title: Principal Frontend Developer at ECIL South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at ECIL South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? ECIL South Asia Partners in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
